evidence_boundary.official: No official source was used to promote a live action.
evidence_boundary.onchain: Only previously verified local PARTI cluster evidence is treated as on-chain evidence in this review.
evidence_boundary.market: Previously verified local PARTI and B2 replays are used as counterexamples; post screenshots stay social claims.
evidence_boundary.social: All posts, screenshots, wallet labels, route claims, profit descriptions, and market-regime opinions from the account.
evidence_boundary.inference: The adopted controls, field mappings, and deferred detector decisions.

adopted_rules.name: deduped_outcome_denominator
adopted_rules.rule: Assign one root_signal_id to the original signal, merge self-quotes and follow-ups, and retain won, lost, mixed, and unresolved outcomes at fixed 24h, 72h, and 7d horizons.

adopted_rules.name: current_regime_expectancy
adopted_rules.rule: Recompute target, staged exits, and time stop from current liquidity, MC/FDV, aggregate OI, venue policy, and capital concentration. Historical monster-token multiples remain background context.

adopted_rules.name: supply_lifecycle_labels
adopted_rules.rule: Classify mint, reissue, retirement, compensation, snapshot, and migration separately, then verify relative float, first receiver, lock conditions, and CEX/LP path.

adopted_rules.name: source_event_time_sanity
adopted_rules.rule: Keep claims pending when source publication time, claimed event time, or quote context conflicts.

adopted_rules.name: flow_recycling_candidate
adopted_rules.rule: A wash-volume claim remains report-only until gross buy and sell, net-to-gross, repeated or round-trip addresses, and quote recovery are locally verified.

counterexamples.lesson: A real wallet fan-out signal can still fail directionally; cluster direction stays unknown until price, next-hop, and sell evidence agree.
Accumulation and long OI can coexist with falling price; motive explanations remain inference.

outcome_ledger.entry_window_definition: No locally verified entry; social discovery only.
outcome_ledger.invalidation: Verified distribution, CEX redeposit, DEX sale with quote recovery, or fixed-horizon price failure.
outcome_ledger.related_local_counterexample: The separate same-day PARTI replay in cases/2026-07-13_miles082510_wallet_cluster_review.md is anchored to a different public post and cannot supply this root signal's exact horizon metrics.

outcome_ledger.entry_window_definition: No locally verified entry; evidence-response conflict case only.
outcome_ledger.invalidation: Price and real spot inventory fail to confirm the claimed accumulation and long-OI thesis.

rejected_shortcuts: Count self-quotes or result updates as independent wins.
Use historical 10x or 100x examples as a current target baseline.
Treat custody or multisig fan-out as one operator without entity and next-hop evidence.
Promote screenshot-described wash volume into an automatic detector.
Use a social signal alone to change a position action.
